summary: Tested Profile Change Ticket System for Addrika e-commerce. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional - retailers can create tickets, view list, and see ticket details. Fixed critical route ordering bug in retailers.py.

Backend API Tests - All Passed (23/23).POST /api/retailer-dashboard/profile-cha: PASSED - Creates tickets for all 4 change types (name_address, gst, spoc, other)
Backend API Tests - All Passed (23/23).GET /api/retailer-dashboard/profile-chan: PASSED - Lists retailer's tickets with status counts and pagination
Backend API Tests - All Passed (23/23).POST /api/retailer-dashboard/profile/ima: PASSED - Uploads profile image (only allowed self-service)
Backend API Tests - All Passed (23/23).GET /api/retailers/admin/profile-change-: PASSED - Admin lists all tickets with status filtering
PASSED - Admin gets ticket with retailer info
Backend API Tests - All Passed (23/23).Validation tests: PASSED - Invalid change_type and short descriptions rejected with 422

Frontend UI Tests - All Passed.Status summary cards: PASSED - Shows Pending, Under Review, Approved, Rejected counts
Frontend UI Tests - All Passed.Info banner: PASSED - Explains profile changes require admin approval
Frontend UI Tests - All Passed.Ticket list: PASSED - Shows tickets with status badges, dates, descriptions
Frontend UI Tests - All Passed.Create ticket form: PASSED - 4 change types, description, new value, document upload
Frontend UI Tests - All Passed.Submit ticket: PASSED - Creates ticket and shows success toast with ticket ID
Frontend UI Tests - All Passed.Ticket detail modal: PASSED - Shows full ticket info on click

bug_fixed.issue: Route ordering bug - /admin/{retailer_id} was catching /admin/profile-change-tickets requests
bug_fixed.fix: Moved profile-change-tickets routes BEFORE the dynamic /admin/{retailer_id} route to ensure proper path matching
bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI routes are matched in order. Static path segments must come before dynamic path parameters for proper routing.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend endpoints properly protected with authentication checks
✓ MongoDB ObjectId (_id) excluded from all API responses
✓ Frontend uses fetchWithAuth for API calls
✓ Form validation present (min 10 chars for description)
✓ All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Multiple test tickets created via API tests. Ticket IDs starting with PCT-
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile Change Ticket System is fully functional. Backend has 23 passing tests. Frontend has Profile Requests page at /retailer/profile-requests with form and list view. Admin can review tickets via /api/retailers/admin/profile-change-tickets endpoints. Fixed route ordering bug in retailers.py. Test retailer (karolbagh@addrika.com) has multiple tickets in various statuses.
